title: Multimodal Summarization
scenario: Write a prompt for an LLM to generate a 5-sentence summary of a given text with a specific emphasis on visual elements. The LLM should identify key points related to the visual elements, eliminate irrelevant information, and prioritize content that highlights the multimedia components. The output should be a concise summary with proper grammar, syntax, and punctuation, accompanied by a brief description of each visual element.
constraints: Must include a brief description of each visual element

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated summary adheres to the given constraints, including word count, tone, and inclusion of brief descriptions.
The summary accurately captures the visual elements and their related key points.
The summary effectively describes the multimedia components and their relevance to the text.
The summary demonstrates proper use of grammar, syntax, and punctuation.
